name: plain-logger-backend
description: API backend for Plain Logger: an internal diagnostic tool for Tier-2 Technical Support Specialists. Parses raw internal-system JSON error logs, looks the error code up deterministically against a known-errors table, and returns a technical specialist diagnostic plus a plain-language employee-facing explanation. Runs zero-config locally against SQLite, or against Supabase/Postgres once configured for deploy. Pure API — no UI. Pairs with a separate plain-logger-frontend.

scripts.db:reset: rm -f local.db local.db-journal && npm run db:init && npm run db:seed
